inclusion_rule_summary: Included in curated subset hcc_adult_extended because large adult hcc microarray cohort with explicit geo tissue labels and a live accession-backed illumina platform mapping path.
exclusion_rule_summary: Restrict the contrast to the curated case and control arms defined in configs/subsets/hcc_adult_extended.yaml.
leakage_risks: Do not use downstream validation outcomes as discovery-time features.
Adjacent or paired non-tumorous tissue is not identical to healthy tissue.
